description: The Tongan Crip Gang is a Tongan American street gang and a subset of the Crips alliance, founded in Inglewood, California. It is active in California, Utah, Alaska, Washington, and parts of Auckland, New Zealand. The gang engages in a wide range of criminal activities including drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder. It was involved in a 2007 federal indictment for a conspiracy to murder members of MS-13.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang is active in the U.S. states of California, Utah and Alaska, Washington and parts of Auckland, New Zealand.
country_links.context: The Tongan Crip Gang is active in parts of Auckland, New Zealand.
